title: DSC 106 Project 1
description: An expository visualization project focused on clearly presenting data patterns and insights using effective visual design principles.

title: DSC 106 Project 2
description: A persuasive and deceptive visualization project exploring how design choices can influence interpretation and audience perception.

title: DSC 106 Project 3
description: An interactive visualization project using user interaction and dynamic visual elements to improve data exploration and understanding.

title: DSC 106 Final Project
description: A final project combining multiple visualization techniques to communicate complex data stories through interactive and effective design.

title: Lab 1: Introduction to the Web platform
description: A personal portfolio website built with HTML.

title: Lab 2: Styling with CSS
description: A styled portfolio website using CSS layout, navigation, and custom properties.

title: Lab 3: Introduction to JS
description: A portfolio website enhanced with basic JavaScript interactions.

title: Lab 4: JavaScript II
description: A JavaScript lab using JSON data, reusable rendering functions, and GitHub API data.

title: Lab 5: Visualizing categorical data with D3
description: Created categorical data visualizations using D3.js to represent grouped comparisons and improve data communication.

title: Lab 6: Visualizing quantitative data with D3
description: Built quantitative visualizations using D3.js to analyze numerical trends, distributions, and relationships in data.

title: Lab 7: Geospatial Visualizations
description: Designed map-based visualizations to explore geographic patterns and spatial relationships using geospatial data.

title: Lab 8: Animation & Scrollytelling
description: Developed animated and scroll-driven visual stories to guide users through data narratives using transitions and storytelling techniques.
